commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Draft member-authored provider support-matrix and compatibility changes need maintainer signoff rather than an automated repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff does not add dependencies, workflows, downloaded code, or secret handling, and the WSLInterop registration is guest-local bootstrap behavior. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Azure native Windows ARM64 lease support across CLI and Worker validation/provisioning, adds `CRABBOX_AZURE_WINDOWS_ARM64_IMAGE`, rejects Azure Windows ARM64 WSL2, repairs WSL interop bootstrap, and updates docs/tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a reproduced bug report. Source inspection shows current main rejects ARM64 non-Linux targets, and the PR adds tests for the new Azure Windows ARM64 allow/reject paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Draft member-authored provider support-matrix and compatibility changes need maintainer signoff rather than an automated repair.
